Data Quality

Completeness, timeliness & validation checks on NMC surveillance data

NoteDevelopment Roadmap — Data Quality
Phase Feature Status
v0.1 Reporting completeness by province (% days with ≥ 1 case) ✅ Done
v0.1 Weekly submission heatmap ✅ Done
v0.2 Timeliness metrics (median days from onset to notification) ✅ Done
v0.2 Linkage-field completeness trend (ID / folder / MRN) ✅ Done
v0.3 Duplicate detection summary 🔲 Planned
v0.3 Missing-field rates by condition (name, age, sex, district) 🔲 Planned
v0.3 Facility-level reporting participation rates 🔲 Planned
v0.4 Automated data-quality score card (red/amber/green) 🔲 Planned
v0.5 Historic trend of completeness to track improvement 🔲 Planned

Data pipeline: R/prepare_dashboard_data.r → data/processed/agg_province.rds

Data through: 16 March 2026 — provincial reporting completeness, weekly volume, timeliness & linkage

Reporting Completeness by Province

Proportion of days in the last 90 days where at least one case was notified, aggregated across all conditions.

Weekly Submission Volume

Completeness Table

Notification Timeliness

Median days from symptom onset (or earliest available date) to NMC notification, by condition and month. Lower is better; sustained increases flag a slowdown in the reporting chain.

Warning in RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(max(N, 3L), "Set2"): n too large, allowed maximum for palette Set2 is 8
Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors
Warning in RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(max(N, 3L), "Set2"): n too large, allowed maximum for palette Set2 is 8
Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors

Linkage-Field Completeness — Last 12 Months

Proportion of notifications with a non-missing patient identifier (SA ID number, hospital folder number, MRN) — required for record linkage to lab results, vital registration and other surveillance systems.

Linkage-field completeness (%) by province

TipRelated Pages
  • Methods — full technical documentation of quality checks and indicator definitions
  • Overview — national-level surveillance summary
  • By Province — province-level data that depends on reporting quality
  • Glossary — abbreviations and term definitions

Data sources: NMC, Stats SA · Last update: 2025-10-16
